session.user: Run pytest on the submit pipeline tests and report results: ``` pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/ -v ```
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command on the submit pipeline tests for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on submit pipeline tests with verbose output
